name: # Kolabi XBT scenario grammar:
# SCENARIO <name>: Given <market movement/window>; When <head condition/order type>; Then <tail behaviour/repeat/chain>.
# Price interval convention: use "- -5" for down by at least 5 USD, and "5 +" for up by at least 5 USD.
# Quantity convention: buy-head rows use unique odd quantities; sell-head rows use unique even quantities.
# Kraken boundary: head suffixes are stripped before REST placement. They only choose the local reference or trigger signal.
# Unsupported: M with i/l/m, ! on M/S/MT, and i/l/m on plain tail M/L fail clearly because no trigger price exists.
# Suffix map: l=last, m=mark, i=index. There is no f suffix because it is redundant with m on Kraken.
# --- Core order types ---
# SCENARIO CORE_BUY_M: Given price drops by at least 5 USD; When buy market head is allowed; Then place a last-price reduce-only sell stop tail.
CORE_BUY_M
# SCENARIO CORE_SELL_M: Given price rises by at least 5 USD; When sell market head is allowed; Then place a last-price reduce-only buy stop tail.
CORE_SELL_M
# SCENARIO CORE_BUY_L_POST: Given price drops by at least 5 USD; When buy post-only limit head rests; Then protect with a reduce-only stop.
CORE_BUY_L_POST
# SCENARIO CORE_SELL_L_POST: Given price rises by at least 5 USD; When sell post-only limit head rests; Then protect with a reduce-only stop.
CORE_SELL_L_POST
# --- Head limit price-source suffix matrix ---
# SCENARIO HEAD_L_LAST: Given last price drops by at least 5 USD; When buy Ll head hooks; Then place a last-price reduce-only sell stop.
HEAD_L_LAST
# SCENARIO HEAD_L_MARK: Given mark price drops by at least 5 USD; When buy Lm head hooks; Then place a last-price reduce-only sell stop.
HEAD_L_MARK
# SCENARIO HEAD_L_INDEX: Given index price drops by at least 5 USD; When buy Li head hooks; Then place a last-price reduce-only sell stop.
HEAD_L_INDEX
# --- Head stop/touch trigger-source suffix matrix ---
# SCENARIO HEAD_S_LAST: Given last price rises by at least 5 USD; When sell Sl stop head triggers; Then protect with a buy stop.
HEAD_S_LAST
# SCENARIO HEAD_S_MARK: Given mark price rises by at least 5 USD; When sell Sm stop head triggers; Then protect with a buy stop.
HEAD_S_MARK
# SCENARIO HEAD_S_INDEX: Given index price rises by at least 5 USD; When sell Si stop head triggers; Then protect with a buy stop.
HEAD_S_INDEX
# SCENARIO HEAD_SL_LAST: Given last price rises by at least 5 USD; When sell SLl stop-limit head triggers with 0.5 USD offset; Then protect with a buy stop.
HEAD_SL_LAST
# SCENARIO HEAD_SL_MARK: Given mark price rises by at least 5 USD; When sell SLm stop-limit head triggers with 0.5 USD offset; Then protect with a buy stop.
HEAD_SL_MARK
# SCENARIO HEAD_SL_INDEX: Given index price rises by at least 5 USD; When sell SLi stop-limit head triggers with 0.5 USD offset; Then protect with a buy stop.
HEAD_SL_INDEX
# SCENARIO HEAD_MT_LAST: Given last price drops by at least 5 USD; When buy MTl market-if-touched head triggers; Then protect with a sell stop.
HEAD_MT_LAST
# SCENARIO HEAD_MT_MARK: Given mark price drops by at least 5 USD; When buy MTm market-if-touched head triggers; Then protect with a sell stop.
HEAD_MT_MARK
# SCENARIO HEAD_MT_INDEX: Given index price drops by at least 5 USD; When buy MTi market-if-touched head triggers; Then protect with a sell stop.
HEAD_MT_INDEX
# SCENARIO HEAD_LT_LAST: Given last price drops by at least 5 USD; When buy LTl limit-if-touched head triggers with 0.5 USD offset; Then protect with a sell stop.
HEAD_LT_LAST
# SCENARIO HEAD_LT_MARK: Given mark price drops by at least 5 USD; When buy LTm limit-if-touched head triggers with 0.5 USD offset; Then protect with a sell stop.
HEAD_LT_MARK
# SCENARIO HEAD_LT_INDEX: Given index price drops by at least 5 USD; When buy LTi limit-if-touched head triggers with 0.5 USD offset; Then protect with a sell stop.
HEAD_LT_INDEX
# --- Tail trigger-source suffix matrix ---
# SCENARIO TAIL_S_LAST: Given buy limit head fills after a 5 USD drop; When tail Sl- is placed; Then sell stop uses last trigger and reduce-only.
TAIL_S_LAST
# SCENARIO TAIL_S_MARK: Given buy limit head fills after a 5 USD drop; When tail Sm- is placed; Then sell stop uses mark trigger and reduce-only.
TAIL_S_MARK
# SCENARIO TAIL_S_INDEX: Given buy limit head fills after a 5 USD drop; When tail Si- is placed; Then sell stop uses index trigger and reduce-only.
TAIL_S_INDEX
# SCENARIO TAIL_SL_LAST: Given sell limit head fills after a 5 USD rise; When tail SLl- is placed with 0.5 USD limit offset; Then buy stop-limit uses last trigger and reduce-only.
TAIL_SL_LAST
# SCENARIO TAIL_SL_MARK: Given sell limit head fills after a 5 USD rise; When tail SLm- is placed with 0.5 USD limit offset; Then buy stop-limit uses mark trigger and reduce-only.
TAIL_SL_MARK
# SCENARIO TAIL_SL_INDEX: Given sell limit head fills after a 5 USD rise; When tail SLi- is placed with 0.5 USD limit offset; Then buy stop-limit uses index trigger and reduce-only.
TAIL_SL_INDEX
# SCENARIO TAIL_MT_LAST: Given buy limit head fills after a 5 USD drop; When tail MTl- is placed; Then sell market-if-touched uses last trigger and reduce-only.
TAIL_MT_LAST
# SCENARIO TAIL_MT_MARK: Given buy limit head fills after a 5 USD drop; When tail MTm- is placed; Then sell market-if-touched uses mark trigger and reduce-only.
TAIL_MT_MARK
# SCENARIO TAIL_MT_INDEX: Given buy limit head fills after a 5 USD drop; When tail MTi- is placed; Then sell market-if-touched uses index trigger and reduce-only.
TAIL_MT_INDEX
# SCENARIO TAIL_LT_LAST: Given sell limit head fills after a 5 USD rise; When tail LTl- is placed with 0.5 USD limit offset; Then buy limit-if-touched uses last trigger and reduce-only.
TAIL_LT_LAST
# SCENARIO TAIL_LT_MARK: Given sell limit head fills after a 5 USD rise; When tail LTm- is placed with 0.5 USD limit offset; Then buy limit-if-touched uses mark trigger and reduce-only.
TAIL_LT_MARK
# SCENARIO TAIL_LT_INDEX: Given sell limit head fills after a 5 USD rise; When tail LTi- is placed with 0.5 USD limit offset; Then buy limit-if-touched uses index trigger and reduce-only.
TAIL_LT_INDEX
# --- Amount and price interpretation coverage ---
# SCENARIO AT_QA_TD_PCT: Given price drops by at least 0.05 percent; When buy limit head fills; Then nominal reduce-only stop tail is placed.
AT_QA_TD_PCT
# SCENARIO AT_QA_TD_PA: Given absolute XBT price is above zero; When buy limit head fills; Then nominal reduce-only stop tail is placed.
AT_QA_TD_PA
# SCENARIO AT_QA_TP_PD: Given price drops by at least 5 USD; When buy limit head fills; Then percent-distance reduce-only stop tail is placed.
AT_QA_TP_PD
# SCENARIO AT_QA_TA_PD: Given price drops by at least 5 USD; When buy limit head fills; Then absolute-price reduce-only stop tail is placed.
AT_QA_TA_PD
# SCENARIO AT_QP_TD_PD: Given price rises by at least 5 USD; When sell limit head fills with percentage quantity semantics; Then nominal reduce-only stop tail is placed.
AT_QP_TD_PD
# --- Runtime, repeat, and chain coverage ---
# SCENARIO NOW_MARKET: Given price drops by at least 2 USD; When buy market head hooks immediately; Then place a tight reduce-only stop.
NOW_MARKET
# SCENARIO DELAY_MARKET: Given activation starts after 2 minutes; When price drops by at least 2 USD; Then buy market and place a tight reduce-only stop.
DELAY_MARKET
# SCENARIO SHORT_WINDOW: Given only 1 minute of validity; When price rises by at least 2 USD; Then sell market if still inside the window.
SHORT_WINDOW
# SCENARIO REPEAT_FAST: Given 20 minutes and 3 attempts; When price drops by at least 5 USD; Then repeat after terminal close while the window remains open.
REPEAT_FAST
# SCENARIO CHAIN_PARENT: Given 20 minutes and 2 attempts; When price rises by at least 5 USD; Then sell market and release CHAIN_CHILD after successful close.
CHAIN_PARENT
# SCENARIO CHAIN_CHILD: Given CHAIN_PARENT has freshly closed; When price drops by at least 4 USD after release; Then buy market and consume only that close edge.
CHAIN_CHILD
# --- Rejected grammar examples kept as comments ---
# BAD_HEAD_M_MARK would fail: M has no price-source suffix; use M without suffix.
# BAD_TAIL_L_MARK would fail: plain L tail has no trigger signal; use bare L or a trigger-family tail such as Sm-/SLm-/MTm-/LTm-.
# BAD_POST_MARKET would fail: ! is post-only and only belongs to limit-capable order types.
# BAD_F_SUFFIX would fail: f is not part of the grammar; use m for mark price.
